summary: Frontend testing complete for /blog/energy-efficient-appliances page (Precision Craft redesign). All 20 test features passed. Page correctly implements: Hero with breadcrumb (Home → Blog → Expert Advice), Expert Advice pill, Dec 28 2024, 7 min read, H1 with 'Save $230–$440/Year', Savings Impact Banner (4 cards + total), TOC with 6 anchor links, 4 appliance sections with savings badges, TipCards with numbered circles (5+4+5+5=19 total), Mid-article CTA after Washer section, Estimated Annual Savings table (4 rows + total), FAQ accordion (5 items), Bottom CTA with 'PEAK PERFORMANCE' eyebrow, Author box (Andrei, License #51001), 3 sidebar widgets, Related Services (3 cards), Footer, Floating button, Mobile sticky bar, and responsive 2-column/1-column layout.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /blog/energy-efficient-appliances page is fully functional with all Precision Craft design elements. This is a static React component with no backend API calls. Uses custom SEOMetaTags + useSchemas for SEO (NOT react-helmet-async). TipCards component renders numbered circles (1-5) with hover border-left effect. SectionH2 uses savings badges format (SAVE $X/YR).
